alert_feature_info.msg_features: 50 dimensions: ASCII codes of alert message normalized to [0,1]
alert_feature_info.ttp_ascii_features: 20 dimensions: ASCII codes of ATT&CK TTP phase normalized to [0,1]
alert_feature_info.attack_ascii_features: 20 dimensions: ASCII codes of attack type normalized to [0,1]
alert_feature_info.ttp_dict_features: 2 dimensions: TTP phase category encoding [reconnaissance_vs_execution, command_control_vs_exfiltration]
alert_feature_info.attack_dict_features: 2 dimensions: Attack type category encoding [scanning_vs_malicious, reconnaissance_vs_exploitation]

edge_label_info.description: Edge labels represent threat severity levels
